category_sources: Official DevSpace homepage says it is an open-source developer tool for Kubernetes for deploying and developing cloud-native software.
source_facts.description: CLI helps develop/deploy/debug apps with Docker and k8s.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title is devspace-sh/devspace and README heading describes DevSpace.
Official homepage uses the name DevSpace.
docs_sources: Official DevSpace documentation site provides getting-started and development documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/devspace-sh/devspace, so repo enrichment was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official DevSpace homepage describes Kubernetes development, deployment, and cloud-native workflows.
source_facts.description identifies Docker and Kubernetes development/deployment/debugging.
